Query.SQL: SELECT W.WARRANT_ID AS "C.ENFORCEMENT_NUMBER", W.WARRANT_NUMBER AS "C.DISPLAY_NUMBER", 'HOME WARRANT' AS "C.ENFORCEMENT_TYPE", W.DEFENDANT1 AS "C.DEFENDANT1", W.DEFENDANT2 AS "C.DEFENDANT2", W.ISSUED_BY AS "C.ISSUING_COURT", W.EXECUTED_BY AS "C.EXECUTING_COURT", W.CURRENTLY_OWNED_BY AS "C.OWNING_COURT" FROM WARRANTS W WHERE W.WARRANT_NUMBER = ${param.warrantNumber} AND W.EXECUTED_BY = ${param.executingCourt} AND W.LOCAL_WARRANT_NUMBER IS NULL

SELECT DECODE(COUNT(*), 0, 'Y', 'N') AS "C.OUTSTANDING" FROM WARRANT_RETURNS WR, RETURN_CODES RC WHERE WR.WARRANT_ID = ${C.ENFORCEMENT_NUMBER} AND WR.ERROR_INDICATOR = 'N' AND WR.RETURN_CODE = RC.RETURN_CODE AND RC.RETURN_TYPE = 'F'
